simp [h₁]
    <;> norm_cast
    <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  have h₅ : (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
    -- Use the fact that FReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t).re and similarly for G
    calc
      (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (FReal t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := by rw [h₄]
      _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
        rw [h₂, h₃]
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
        -- Since the imaginary parts are zero, the division of the real parts is the same as the division of the complex numbers
        have h₅₁ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).im = 0 := by
          simp [Function.resToImagAxis]
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]

          <;> linarith

          <;> norm_num

        have h₅₃ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
          apply Complex.ext <;> simp [h₅₁] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
        have h₅₄ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
          apply Complex.ext <;> simp [h₅₂] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
        rw [h₅₃, h₅₄]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
  -- Since the imaginary parts are zero, the real parts must be equal
  have h₆ : (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    have h₆₁ := h₅
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.normSq] at h₆₁ ⊢
    <;> norm_num at h₆₁ ⊢ <;>
    (try ring_nf at h₆₁ ⊢) <;>
    (try norm_num at h₆₁ ⊢) <;>
    (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try nlinarith) <;>
    (try field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero] at h₆₁ ⊢ <;> nlinarith)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        cases' eq_or_ne (G.resToImagAxis t).re with h h <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero, div_eq_mul_inv] <;>
        field_simp [h] at * <;>
        nlinarith
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        cases' eq_or_ne (G.resToImagAxis t).re with h h <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero, div_eq_mul_inv] <;>
        field_simp [h] at * <;>
        nlinarith
      })
  -- The result follows directly from the above steps
  have h₇ : FmodGReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
    have h₇₁ : (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
      exact h₆
    have h₇₂ : (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = (FmodGReal t : ℝ) := rfl
    have h₇₃ : ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ)).re = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
      have h₇₃₁ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).im = 0 := by
        simp [Function.resToImagAxis]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₇₃₂ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).im = 0 := by
        simp [Function.resToImagAxis]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.normSq, h₇₃₁, h₇₃₂]
      <;> ring_nf <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero] <;> norm_num <;> linarith
    -- Use the fact that the real parts are equal to conclude the proof
    have h₇₄ : (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ)).re := by
      calc
        (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by rw [h₆]
        _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ)).re := by
          rw [h₇₃]
    -- Convert the result back to the desired form
    have h₇₅ : (FmodGReal t : ℝ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ)).re := by
      exact h₇₄
    -- Since the imaginary parts are zero, the real parts must be equal
    simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.normSq]
    <;> norm_num <;>
    (try ring_nf at * ) <;>
    (try norm_num at * ) <;>
    (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try nlinarith)
    <;>
    (try

        cases' eq_or_ne (G.resToImagAxis t).re with h h <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero, div_eq_mul_inv] <;>
        field_simp [h] at * <;>
        nlinarith
      })
  -- The final result follows from the above steps
  exact h₇

    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
  
  have h2 : GReal t = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    rw [GReal]
    <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
  
  have h3 : FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := rfl
  
  have h4 : (F.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    simp_all [FReal, Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  
  have h5 : (G.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    simp_all [GReal, Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  
  have h6 : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (FReal t : ℝ) := by
    have h6₁ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ⟨(F.resToImagAxis t).re, (F.resToImagAxis t).im⟩ := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    rw [h6₁]
    have h6₂ : (F.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := h4
    rw [h6₂]
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, h1]
    <;> norm_cast
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
  
  have h7 : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (GReal t : ℝ) := by
    have h7₁ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ⟨(G.resToImagAxis t).re, (G.resToImagAxis t).im⟩ := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    rw [h7₁]
    have h7₂ : (G.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := h5
    rw [h7₂]
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, h2]
    <;> norm_cast
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
  
  simp_all [h1, h2, h3, h6, h7]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> field_simp [h4, h5]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith

simp [Function.resToImagAxis, F, G]
    <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  simp only [FmodGReal, FReal, GReal] at *
  <;> norm_cast at *
  <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> ring_nf at *

  <;> linarith

sorry
  calc
    FmodGReal t = (FReal t : ℝ) / (GReal t : ℝ) := h₀
    _ = ((FReal t : ℝ) : ℂ) / ((GReal t : ℝ) : ℂ) := h₁
    _ = (F$resToImagAxis t) / (G$resToImagAxis t) := h₂

simpa [FReal] using F_eq_FReal ht
  have h₃ : GReal t = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    simpa [GReal] using G_eq_GReal ht
  rw [h₁, h₂, h₃]
  have h₄ : (F.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    -- This is a property of the function F on the imaginary axis
    -- (we are assuming F is real-valued here)
    simp [F, E₂, E₄, E₆, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three, Complex.ofReal_zero]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  have h₅ : (G.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    -- This is a property of the function G on the imaginary axis
    -- (we are assuming G is real-valued here)
    simp [G, H₂, H₄, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three, Complex.ofReal_zero]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  have h₆ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    -- Since the imaginary part is 0, the complex number is equal to its real part
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, h₄]
  have h₇ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    -- Since the imaginary part is 0, the complex number is equal to its real part
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, h₅]
  have h₈ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
    rw [h₆, h₇]
  have h₉ : ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) := by
    norm_cast
    <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> field_simp
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
  have h₁₀ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₈, h₉]
  have h₁₁ : (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := rfl
  simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
  <;> norm_num at *
  <;> field_simp at *
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> norm_cast at *
  <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
  <;> norm_num at *
  <;> linarith

simp [FReal]
  have h₃ : GReal t = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    rw [G_eq_GReal ht]
    <;> simp [GReal]
  have h₄ : (F.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    have h₅ : F.resToImagAxis t = ⟨(F.resToImagAxis t).re, 0⟩ := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [F]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try field_simp at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero])
      <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try linarith)
    simp [h₅]
  have h₅ : (G.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    have h₆ : G.resToImagAxis t = ⟨(G.resToImagAxis t).re, 0⟩ := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [G]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try field_simp at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero])
      <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try linarith)
    simp [h₆]
  calc
    FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by rw [h₁]
    _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) := by
      rw [h₂, h₃]
      <;> norm_cast
    _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, h₄, h₅, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.normSq]
      <;> field_simp [h₄, h₅]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ofReal_eq_zero]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith

simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₃ : FReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    rw [FReal]
    <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₄ : (F.resToImagAxis t).re = F.resToImagAxis t := by
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.real]
  have h₅ : (G.resToImagAxis t).re = G.resToImagAxis t := by
    simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.real]
  have h₆ : FmodGReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
    calc
      FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re) := by
        rw [h₃, h₂]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
        rw [h₄, h₅]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
  exact h₆

simp [GReal]
    <;>
    simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three, mul_comm]
    <;>
    ring_nf at *
    <;>

  have h₂ : FReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t).re := by

  have h₄ : (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
    have h₅ : (F.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by

    have h₇ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
      rw [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> simp [h₅]
      <;> norm_num
    have h₈ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by
      rw [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> simp [h₆]
      <;> norm_num
    calc
      (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) : ℂ) := by simp
      _ = (((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) : ℂ) / (((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
        rw [h₇, h₈]
      _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by simp
  calc
    FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by rw [h₃]
    _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) := by
      rw [h₂, h₁]
    _ = ↑((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) / ↑((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℝ) := by norm_cast
    _ = (↑(F.resToImagAxis t) : ℂ) / (↑(G.resToImagAxis t) : ℂ) := by
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three, mul_comm]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *

        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>

        <;>

      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three, mul_comm]
      <;>
      field_simp at *
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      linarith

simp [FmodGReal, FReal, GReal]
    <;> norm_cast
  
  have h₂ : (FReal t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
    have h₃ := F_eq_FReal ht
    simp [FReal] at h₃ ⊢
    <;> norm_cast at h₃ ⊢ <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  
  have h₃ : (GReal t : ℂ) = (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
    have h₄ := G_eq_GReal ht
    simp [GReal] at h₄ ⊢
    <;> norm_cast at h₄ ⊢ <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  
  have h₄ : (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
    calc
      (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (FReal t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := h₁
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := by rw [h₂]
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by rw [h₃]
  
  have h₅ : FmodGReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
    have h₅₁ := h₄
    simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h₅₁ ⊢
    <;>
    (try norm_num at h₅₁ ⊢) <;>
    (try simp_all [FmodGReal, FReal, GReal, Complex.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try norm_cast at h₅₁ ⊢) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try
      {
        field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, FmodGReal, FReal, GReal] at h₅₁ ⊢
        <;>
        norm_cast at h₅₁ ⊢ <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num at h₅₁ ⊢ <;>
        linarith
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num at h₅₁ ⊢ <;>
        linarith
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num at h₅₁ ⊢ <;>
        linarith
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num at h₅₁ ⊢ <;>
        linarith
      })
  
  exact h₅

simp [F, E₂, E₄, E₆, Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;> linarith
  have h₇ : (G.resToImagAxis t).im = 0 := by
    simp [G, H₂, H₄, Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, pow_three]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;> linarith
  have h₈ : FmodGReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
    calc
      FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t).re / (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
        rw [h₂, h₃]
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
        have h₉ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t).re := by
          apply Complex.ext <;> simp [h₆] <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
        have h₁₀ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by
          apply Complex.ext <;> simp [h₇] <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
        rw [h₉, h₁₀]
        <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
  exact h₈

    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [FReal, GReal]
    <;>
    field_simp
    <;>
    ring_nf
  
  have h₂ : FReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t).re := by
    simp [FReal]
    <;>
    simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>

  have h₃ : GReal t = (G.resToImagAxis t).re := by

    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;>
    norm_num
  
  have h₄ : (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by
    have h₅ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (FReal t : ℂ) := by
      have h₅₁ : F.resToImagAxis t = FReal t := by
        have h₅₂ : F.resToImagAxis t = FReal t := by
          apply F_eq_FReal
          <;> assumption
        exact h₅₂
      rw [h₅₁]
      <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> simp_all [FReal]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> norm_num
    have h₆ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) = (GReal t : ℂ) := by
      have h₆₁ : G.resToImagAxis t = GReal t := by
        have h₆₂ : G.resToImagAxis t = GReal t := by
          apply G_eq_GReal
          <;> assumption
        exact h₆₂
      rw [h₆₁]
      <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> simp_all [GReal]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;> norm_num
    calc
      (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) = (FReal t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := by
        rw [h₅, h₆]
        <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> simp_all [FReal, GReal]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
      _ = (FReal t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := by rfl
      _ = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := by
        simp [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> simp_all [FReal, GReal]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
  
  calc
    FmodGReal t = (FReal t) / (GReal t) := h₁
    _ = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
      rw [h₄]
      <;>
      simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      simp_all [FReal, GReal]
      <;>

      <;>

      <;>

simp [h₁, h₂, h₃]
  <;>
  simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.ofReal_div]

  field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.div_re, Complex.div_im, Complex.ofReal_div]

simp [FmodGReal, FReal, GReal]
  <;>
  norm_cast
  <;>
  field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff]
  <;>
  simp_all [Function.funext_iff, Complex.ext_iff]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>
  simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Function.funext_iff]
  <;>
  linarith

simp [h₁]
    <;> norm_cast
  have h₇ : (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
    calc
      (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (FReal t : ℂ) / (GReal t : ℂ) := by rw [h₆]
      _ = ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) := by rw [h₂, h₃]
      _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
        have h₈ : (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).im = 0 := by
          simp [Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff]
          <;>
          simp_all [E₂, E₄, E₆, H₂, H₄, negDE₂, Δ_fun, L₁₀, SerreDer_22_L₁₀]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;>
          norm_num
        have h₉ : (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).im = 0 := by
          simp [Function.resToImagAxis, Complex.ext_iff]
          <;>
          simp_all [E₂, E₄, E₆, H₂, H₄, negDE₂, Δ_fun, L₁₀, SerreDer_22_L₁₀]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;>
          norm_num
        have h₁₀ : ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).re : ℂ) := by
          rw [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;> simp_all [h₈]
          <;> norm_num
        have h₁₁ : ((G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) : ℂ) = ((G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).re : ℂ) := by
          rw [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;> simp_all [h₉]
          <;> norm_num
        calc
          ((F.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t).re : ℂ) = ((F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).re : ℂ) / ((G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ).re : ℂ) := by simp
          _ = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := by
            rw [h₁₀, h₁₁]
            <;> field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, h₈, h₉]
            <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
            <;> norm_num
  have h₈ : (FmodGReal t : ℂ) = (F.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) / (G.resToImagAxis t : ℂ) := h₇
  have h₉ : FmodGReal t = (F.resToImagAxis t) / (G.resToImagAxis t) := by
    norm_cast at h₈ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [E₂, E₄, E₆, H₂, H₄, negDE₂, Δ_fun, L₁₀, SerreDer_22_L₁₀]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        field_simp [Complex.ext_iff] at *
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  exact h₉
